# Lorenz Maierhofer
> Senior Director, Global Lead for AI Factory, Agentic AI Products & AI Governance at Procter & Gamble. Based in Geneva, Switzerland.

Lorenz Maierhofer leads enterprise AI transformation at P&G, focusing on AI Factory, Agentic AI, and AI Governance across global operations. Harvard Business School alumnus and Technische Universität Graz graduate.

## Pages
- About: https://lorenzmaierhofer.com/
- About (DE): https://lorenzmaierhofer.com/de/
- About (ZH): https://lorenzmaierhofer.com/zh/
- News & Talks: https://lorenzmaierhofer.com/news.html
- Projects: https://lorenzmaierhofer.com/projects.html

## Projects
- Grimasso (iOS myofunctional therapy app for children): https://lorenzmaierhofer.com/grimasso/
